item.title: Download lessmsi 2.12.6
item.description: Lessmsi (Less MSIerables) is a free and portable application that allows users to view and extract the contents of MSI files. How does it work? Files with the .msi extension are not as widely used as their .exe cousins, but both contain programs for Windows. The main difference between them is that the latter does not always come with an installer, while it comes standard with the former. However, there will be cases where you just need to view or want to extract specific content from...
